text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is finally starting her senior
year. And how is she starting off this new
chapter?

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
And now, let's look back on some of the greatest
moments in the Twinkle Series last year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's starting! It's starting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's requested that we watch a TV program
looking back on last year's races in my office
today.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
It's impossible to talk about last year without
mentioning the Beast herself, Oguri Cap! She
gave us so many memorable races!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! It's Oguri! Of course!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Her race against White Lightning, Tamamo Cross,
left quite an impression on viewers. I've become
quite a fan myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! They're both so cool!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be a stretch to say she's dominated
the Twinkle Series spotlight. This might just be
the dawn of the Oguri Cap era.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri's own era?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The program ends up spending the whole runtime
on Oguri Cap, essentially becoming a special
feature on her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... It's one thing to leave out my sprints, but I
can believe they didn't show Yaeno or anyone
else either! What a bummer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess that just shows how impressive Oguri
was last year.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. That must be it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Someday... I want to race against Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear Bamboo Memory has Oguri Cap on her
mind as well. Likely because of a certain
interaction from her past.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And... that was an amazing race. I hope to run
with you again.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of... OF COURSE! I promise—you haven't seen
the last of me, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I... Sniff... Sob!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's just—it's so, SO frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before Bamboo Memory made her debut, she
competed against Oguri Cap in a Tracen Meet.
Despite being a bitter defeat, it was followed by
a promise for the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Ever since that day, Oguri Cap has had a
special place in her thoughts—as a racer she'd like
to compete against again one day.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Is there any chance that I could race
Oguri again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Oguri Cap's racing history, she
primarily focuses on mile and medium-distance
races. There's a pretty good chance she'll be in a
G1 mile.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A mile? That's one of the two kinds of races I'm
aiming to dominate...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...All right! I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Someday, I'm going to race against Oguri in a G1
mile and win! I have to, if I'm going to be the best
at miles!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Only then will I be able to stand loud and proud
and say... Bamboo Memory rules the mile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's unwavering determination in
the face of the public's current obsession with
Oguri Cap is quite reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet again, I can't help but think that this
indomitable spirit of hers is her greatest strength.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But first, there's the Takamatsunomiya Kinen
sprint! That's my first step to the top!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And that will lead us to a G1 mile! I'll make these
words into reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Bamboo Memory has a nice, positive
outlook for the future...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us visit a shrine to pray for good luck
in her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how many races Oguri will win this year...
Maybe she'll go the whole year undefeated!

text_block_list.name: Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
Well, it certainly seems possible. She's in another
league right now. Plus, she's always trending on
social media whenever she's racing.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Those people just now were talking about Oguri!
She really is all the rage!
choice_data_list: I guess she really has dominated the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's like they didn't even see me. She really is all
anyone can talk about...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, that doesn't matter! I've just got to focus on
my own path! I'm gonna pray even harder than
last year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, what are you going to pray for
this year, Trainer?
choice_data_list: What we need to reach our goals—GROWTH!
The one thing you can't train—LUCK!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're totally right! Can't race or train if
you're not in tip-top shape!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay then! I'll follow your example and pray for
good health too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we both pray for good health as we
prepare to face the challenges awaiting us in her
senior year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Now that's what I call ambition! Yeah, I
definitely wanna grow as a racer—mentally,
physically, technically... EVERYTHING!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna pray for growth too, so we can
aim higher and higher!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we both pray for growth as we prepare to
face the challenges awaiting us in her senior year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Luck?! That's not quite what I expected!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But sure enough, luck is essential in the
competitive world... Now that I think about it, I
think that's a great choice!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's settled! I'm going to pray for luck
as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we both pray for good luck as we prepare
to face the challenges awaiting us in her senior
year!
